message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant Browser
entity Cell
class FormulaCompiler
database ExcelExpressionCompiler
rectangle "FormulaEvalVisitor" { }
queue FunctionCall
control Function

User ->> Browser : select workbook\n\ntype in formula\n\nclick button
Browser->Cell:setContent(formula)
activate Cell
    activate Cell 
        note right of Cell #D3D3D3#storeContent(formula)#END_NOTE#
            deactivate Cell  
                Cell --> FormualCompilerr:compile(this,formula)\n\t compile(cell,formaula) \n visit()  \tvisitFunction_call()\nreevaluate()\nevalute()\napplyTo()\nrefresh cell
                
@enduml
